name: Snapshot Studios
description: Classic, traditional wedding photography at an honest price. We focus on the timeless shots your family will treasure -- group portraits, ceremony moments, and beautifully lit reception coverage. No trends, just quality.

includes: Thank-you card template with your photos

videography_addon.note: We specialize in photography only. Happy to recommend local videographers we've worked with.

album_and_print_addons.note: Full-day package includes 25 printed 4x6 photos. Affordable album and print options available.

deposit_and_cancellation.retainer_note: Low retainer to make booking easy. We're a family-run studio and want to be accessible.

sweeteners: Free engagement mini-session with any package
25 complimentary printed photos for bookings over $1500
10% off for military, first responders, and teachers
Free extra hour of coverage for Friday or Sunday weddings
Referral bonus: $100 off your package for each couple you refer

personality.notes: Family-run studio building their portfolio and reputation. Very willing to negotiate on price and customize packages. Quick to respond and accommodating on scheduling. Great value for couples on a budget who want reliable, classic coverage.
